## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] All containers start cleanly: `docker compose -f local/docker-compose.yml up -d`
- [ ] `docker compose -f local/docker-compose.yml ps` shows all services healthy
- [ ] Environment variable templates updated (if new variables introduced)
- [ ] `README.md` updated to reflect any user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
